results.rendered_html:
niṣṭhyūta p. p.
1 Spit out, exuded, cast or thrown out; niṣṭyūtaścaraṇopayogasulabho lākṣārasaḥ kenacit  Ś. 4. 4 ;  R. 2. 75 ;  Śi. 3. 10. 
2 Uttered.
— taṃ Spitting out.
